heading: Training of tribal law enforcement and prosecutorial personnel
label: 20714 Training of tribal law enforcement and prosecutorial personnel
text: The Attorney General, in consultation with the Director of the Office of Tribal Justice, shall carry out a program under which tribal law enforcement officials may receive technical assistance and training to pursue a victim-centered approach to investigating and prosecuting severe forms of trafficking in persons (as defined in ).section 7102 of title 22
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to renumbering by .section 20709c of this titlePub. L. 117–347
